assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'different strategies per pool' with surge upgrade for L4 pool and cordon-and-wait approach for A100 pool

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends maxSurge=5 instead of 1 or 2, which is more aggressive than the expectation specified

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly addresses driver compatibility, mentions 'GKE 1.32 may install different CUDA drivers than 1.31' and includes test cluster setup for verifying CUDA/driver compatibility

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response recommends 'cordon-and-wait approach' to 'allow natural job completion' and 'cordon nodes during fine-tuning job gaps'

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response states 'No live migration: Every GPU node upgrade requires pod restart' in GPU-Specific Considerations section

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs) at all in the upgrade strategy

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly address how auto-scaler creates new nodes at old version during upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed test cluster setup with commands to 'Deploy test inference and fine-tuning workloads to verify CUDA/driver compatibility'
